name: Crispy Beef in Chili Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 2-inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the beef from the pan and set aside.
5. Reduce heat to low and add chili sauce to the pan, stirring to coat the bottom of the pan.
6. Return the beef to the pan and stir gently until heated through.
7. Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
